name: 2.39:1 (Anamorphic Widescreen)
description: Ultra-wide theatrical format commonly used for epic films, blockbuster action, and immersive landscapes.

name: 1.85:1 (Standard Flat Cinema)
description: Standard theatrical aspect ratio, filling the frame more vertically than anamorphic widescreen.

name: 1.33:1 (Academy 4:3 Vintage)
description: Classic square-like cinema ratio, providing a nostalgic, intimate, or arthouse feel.

name: 1.43:1 (IMAX GT Format)
description: Huge, immersive square-vertical hybrid ratio utilized for breathtaking IMAX cinema experiences.

name: 9:16 (Modern Vertical Cinema)
description: Vertical framing tailored for cinematic storytelling on mobile screens and social platforms.

name: 1.00:1 (Square Artistic)
description: Balanced 1:1 framing offering strict symmetry and abstract, stylized focal composition.
